scenarios.source: Anthropic Economic Index (Feb 2025) + flows pipeline; see methodology.md

notes: Illustrative tool. Headline scenarios use JT's elicited automation rates. The AEI base case uses the measured automation share a=0.43 and an ASSUMED penetration-growth dpi=0.08/yr; dpi is the unmeasured driver and the central caveat (see proposal section 4.3). Reproduce with compute_x0.py.
